troparia: (Tone 4) Today is the herald of joy for the universe!* Let us anticipate the feast and celebrate with exultation:* Gabriel is on his way to announce the glad tidings to the Virgin;* he is ready to cry out in fear and wonder:* Rejoice, Lady full of grace, the Lord is with you!
kontakia: (Tone 8) You are the beginning of salvation* for all those born on earth, O virgin Theotokos.* The prince of the heavenly legions has been sent* to stand before you with a message of joy.* We join the chorus and call out to you:* Rejoice, O Bride and Maiden ever-pure.
